feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: [XSLT]: Dynamic rows creation and values(in column) based on dynamic nested XML nodes
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Requirement is to send a CSV for a target system from the attached XML.

Source XML is from SFEC which contains department hierarchy and is dynamic for each employees, we need to create the number of rows in CSV based on the department hierarchy for each employee and is achieved already with the attached XSLT. The challenge here is the misalignment of the values in the columns. 

Any leads, suggestion to achieve the desired output within the XSLT would be really helpful.

Regards,

Pavan

entry.title: how can we mention virtual host in amqp adapter
entry.content: how can we mention virtual host in amqp sender adapter

entry.title: What is the difference between OMS and OMM, while using SAP Commerce with S/4 Hana which to use?
entry.content:
We are planning to integrate SAP Commerce Cloud with S/4 Hana Public Cloud, as part of this we need to integrate the Order notifications. 

When I went through the documentation we need to use hooks for notifications but I see oms and omm hooks for e.g : sapCpiOmmOrderConfirmationPersistenceHook and sapCpiOmsOrderConfirmationPersistenceHook, I am bit confused on which one to use in iflow.

Thank you

entry.title: Post payload to CPI iFlow from UI5 - Internal Server Error
entry.content:
I need to send a JSON payload to an iFlow, in Postman the request is successful (with OAuth2 token retrieval and csrf in header), but the response in UI is Internal Server Error (the iFlow is also expecting JSON).

  • I am getting csrf token from GET request to CPI instance and pass it in the following POST request to CPI endpoint :

 

  • The destination configuration is the following and added in xs-app.json : 

     

Also curl -v -i cpi.dest returns 500

* Cpi destination and UI5 app are in different subaccounts.

- What could be the cause of this?

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite - IDOC to flat file conversion
entry.content:
hi All,

We are currently migrating our Integration flows from SAP PO to SAP IS. We have a requirement where we have to convert the IDOC to flat file and send it to the partner. Is there any existing solution to achieve this?Or any standard groovy that could be helpful here?

In PO we used to use the adapter module - IDOCXmlToFlatConvertor

I have also attached the input and expected result.

 

Could anyone kindly suggest any available solution?

Regards,

Smitha

entry.title: CPI Mapping condition issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to implement a mapping condition in CPI but unable to populate the data in target as per the requirement..

Scenario 1

If <S_LT> and <S_TM> contains same number of segments in a context then copy <D_373>  to target field.

Which is working fine.

 

Scenario 2

If <S_TM> comes only once in a context and <S_LT> comes more than once, then copy <D_373> to target as many as the occurrences of <S_LT>

entry.title: AFIP Integration in CPI/CI
entry.content: Hello, We use SAP PO to connect to Argentina gov for AFIP interfaces and need to move to CPI. Is there a standard sap solution available for this in CPI? The solution for PI/PO was a standard one from SAP. I don't see any related package under the Discover tab in CPI. How do we achieve this using CI ?

entry.title: Issue with "if then else"
entry.content:
having issue while passing output of "if then else" to target field in CPI message mapping. only partial value is sent. But in display queue of "if then else" we can see the full value. The same logic is working in another message mapping. Not sure about the root cause.

TIA

entry.title: JSON Web Encryption in SAP CPI using public Key
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a requirement where the incoming payload has to be encrypted using various components of RFC 7516 - JSON Web Encryption (JWE) (ietf.org) JSON Web encryption like cipher text , IV , Additional Auth Tag.

How do u suggest this can be acheived? Can you suggest a script to accomplish this? external jars?

entry.title: Lookup logic in Integration suite
entry.content:
What is typical recommendation for performing lookup in Integration suite. We have a flat file that is generated out of SAP.  Partner requires additional details that are not available in standard program and needs to be retrieved from S/4. 

In ECC days, we would not hesitate to customize the standard program (either through enhancements) to update the file. 

Considering the push to clean core paradigm, Would it make sense to generate the standard file and then do S/4 lookup in integration suite keeping the S/4 core clean?

What are typical best practice recommendations in such scenarios?

entry.title: S4 HANA Brownfield Implementation: BSEG VS ACDOCA - Doc types not available (e.g. AF)
entry.content:
Hello,

We recently completed a Brownfield implementation of S4 HANA, and we are still grappling with a complete understanding of the transitions from ECC to S4, particularly concerning BSEG and ACDOCA. Could you please provide a list of document types that are no longer stored in BSEG? For instance, it's evident that document type AF - Depreciation posting is now stored in ACDOCA instead of BSEG. Are there any other standard SAP document types that have undergone similar changes?

I am not a specialist in this domain and despite reviewing numerous blogs, I have not been able to find a simple list of such document types.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Tarigh

entry.title: Using Integration Suite API's with Basic Auth
entry.content:
Hi Everyone.

I try to create packages using the Integration Suite API's.
This works when I use Client Credentials from the api-service-instance that I created in my Foundry BTP.

Now my problem:
The Package is createdBy the Client-ID:

Since this doesn't look good, I want it to display my user. As far as I know there is no possibility to do this with the API-service-instance. Therefore I need to authenticate using my user.

I found that there should be a way to do that:
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/basic-authentication-of-idp-user-for-api-clients

Now when I try to call an API from Postman with Basic Authentication and my Universal-ID I get an error-message even though I gave myself full permission on all "!it"-roles:
"Error while obtaining token from UAA, with details: Request failed with status code 401"

I couldn't find anything online corresponding with this error-message.

What am I doing wrong?

Thanks for the help

entry.title: Update Public/Private Key in SFTP adapter
entry.content:
Hi All,
User provided Private and Public key to update in SFTP Receiver Adapter.
Can anyone explain how to update in CPI Tenant and use it in Integration Flow.

Thanks.

entry.title: I want to practice questions for CLD900 certification exam ? what are the reliable sources ?
How to backup the files at Receiver End?
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SFTP(SAP) - to - SFTP(3rd Party) Integration Flow, Is there any way to backup the files at receiver end.

If possible, Please provide the steps to do that.

 

Regards,

Jayasri

entry.title: Read an asynchronous messaging with a Timer Event
entry.content:
Hi,
I want a Timer Event which will run daily to read the JMS Queue messages or some asynchronous messaging adapter and forward it for processing.
Request-Reply is not working for JMS Adapter.
How to achieve this?

entry.title: SAP Edge Integration Cell On-Premise supported landscape
entry.content:
Hello, 

I would like to understand what is the supported landscape for SAP Edge Integration Cell on real on-premise landscape?

Anyone have experience implementing SAP Edge Integration Cell on real on-premise landscape? 

The main question we have is if real on-premise SAP EIC is supported by SAP when running on Linux Servers or IBM Power systems?  or is it only supported over Windows systems? 

Any input or guidance on this topic will be very appreciated.

Thanks!

Kind regards!

entry.title: CMS Database - AP_Objects.AP_Filesize
entry.content: Iam exporting (Promotion Management Wizard) our scheduled Crystal reports to a new cluster.  I need to find a way to identify the file size of each report (including historical instances).  I thought ap_objects.ap_filesize would be a good place to start, however I'm not quite sure what it is in measurement and if it includes both the instance and its history.  I'd like to calculate the file size so I know what temp space is required before the Promotion Management Wizard calculates it.

entry.title: ABAP Proxy to SFTP Retry
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a scenario where we CPI receives ABAP proxy call which will be forwarded to a SFTP receiver. Sometimes, we get error in SFTP like server unavailable, timeout etc. In such cases the message is going in failed status in CPI without any retry. What is the best approach for handling retries and also errors?

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - Granular Authorization to Scopes
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have configured our Integration Suite Cloud Integration service in the SAP Cloud ALM. The integration monitoring works as expected. But we want to provide access in the CALM to business users from different areas and allow them to monitor messages under their area of responsibility.  The integration flows in the cloud integration are grouped in packages per business area.

In the Cloud ALM, in the integration and exception monitoring configuration, i can add business services within cloud integration service and filter by integration package. This is also working as expected.

My question is if i can limit the scope selection to specific business services based on authorizations. I can only assign the 'ops_im_IntegrationOwner' role to the business users, having no other control on that. I'm missing anything? Is there any way to achieve the above?

Thank you
